text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I didn't really have anything in particular going on
today, but King Halo has invited me out to an
amusement park.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehehehe...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's in her signature racewear for some reason,
and what's more, she's been cackling nonstop.
There's only one conclusion I can draw from this.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Of course not, you dingus!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Are you still half-asleep or something? Dust off
that brain of yours! I'm holding an autograph
session here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take out my planner to double-check my
schedule for the week.
choice_data_list:
Let's see, your autograph session is supposed to
be...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Come along! Let's head over already. I can't keep
my fans waiting.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why isn't there anyone queueing up for me?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
We put out such a gorgeous sign to advertise it!
Why isn't anyone here?! Are they all simply
ignoring the fact that I'm having an event today?!
choice_data_list:
Hey, are you sure the event was scheduled for
today?

Hey, are you sure the event was scheduled for
today?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Of course. You said yourself in our meeting that
it's happening this week on...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Wait...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmmm?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We look at the sign put out to advertise the
session. It lists the date as...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Which is why we're here today to scout out the venue and blow off some stress at the park!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Say something, will you?! So what if we're here
early? It was our day off anyway!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I'm a first-rate among first-rates—in fact, I am the
first-rate conqueror of G1 races across all
distances! And it's been forever since either of us
has had a break.
choice_data_list:
You've sure pulled off some amazing
achievements.

You've sure pulled off some amazing
achievements.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It certainly has been a journey fit for a king.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And I didn't get here by following in someone
else's footsteps, but by forging my very own
magnificent... detour of a path.
choice_data_list:
I guess you could say we're taking a detour
today, too.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hmph!
King!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Are you here to have fun too?! If so, why don't
you and I burn some rubber in those go-karts
over—

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
What's this?! Your trainer is with you?! Are you
two here... to work?
choice_data_list: Er, no... We're actually here because—

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Don't you dare! Shh! Shhhhh!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ahem. I'm here to survey the area in preparation
for my autograph session tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: My! You're so dedicated to your duties!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, I am. I've just finished my prep work,
however, so why don't we enjoy our time here
together?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I grant you permission to entertain us as
best you possibly can!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
But of course! Is it not your duty to support me in
every which way you can at all times?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You've taken my hand and accompanied me
through the most winding of detours, and today
will be no exception.
choice_data_list: Guess I don't have much of a choice, do I?
Guess I don't have much of a choice, do I?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Hehehe. My thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo has a fantastic day at the amusement
park and, the following day, hosts her autograph
session with her usual royal charm.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some time later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bzzzt... Bzzzt...
choice_data_list: Hm? I wonder who's calling me...

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"Thank you for always taking such good care of
my daughter. I've called today because there's
something I wish to ask you."

text_block_list.name: King Halo's Mother
text_block_list.text:
"Do you happen to know whether she still likes
the same patterns she did as a child?"

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Is someone calling about holding another
autograph session, perhaps?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...I have a feeling I'll be accompanying King Halo
down this new detour as well.
